Name: insert_exercise_logs
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "kind", $3::uuid AS "owner_id") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."exercise_logs" ("id", "kind", "owner_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_0."id", check_mutation_result_0."kind", check_mutation_result_0."owner_id" FROM check_mutation_result_0 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $4::uuid AS "id", $5::text AS "kind", $6::uuid AS "owner_id") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."exercise_logs" ("id", "kind", "owner_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_1."id", check_mutation_result_1."kind", check_mutation_result_1."owner_id" FROM check_mutation_result_1 RETURNING *), mutation_result AS (SELECT mutation_result_0."id", mutation_result_0."kind", mutation_result_0."owner_id" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT mutation_result_1."id", mutation_result_1."kind", mutation_result_1."owner_id" FROM mutation_result_1), check_nested_sets AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $7::int4 AS "reps", mutation_result_0."id" AS "parent_id", mutation_result_0."kind" AS "parent_kind" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT $8::int4 AS "reps", mutation_result_1."id" AS "parent_id", mutation_result_1."kind" AS "parent_kind" FROM mutation_result_1) AS data WHERE true), nested_sets AS (INSERT INTO "public"."exercise_log_sets" ("reps", "parent_id", "parent_kind") SELECT check_nested_sets."reps", check_nested_sets."parent_id", check_nested_sets."parent_kind" FROM check_nested_sets RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_sets)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", "mutation_result.r.sets"."sets" AS "sets" FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("mutation_result.r.sets"), '[]') AS "sets" FROM (WITH "mutation_result.r.sets.base" AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT nested_sets."id" AS "id", nested_sets."parent_id" AS "parent_id", nested_sets."parent_kind" AS "parent_kind", nested_sets."reps" AS "reps" FROM nested_sets UNION ALL SELECT "public"."exercise_log_sets"."id" AS "id", "public"."exercise_log_sets"."parent_id" AS "parent_id", "public"."exercise_log_sets"."parent_kind" AS "parent_kind", "public"."exercise_log_sets"."reps" AS "reps" FROM "public"."exercise_log_sets" WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT nested_sets."id" AS "id" FROM nested_sets) AS "mutation_result.r.sets.source.nested_keys" WHERE "mutation_result.r.sets.source.nested_keys"."id" = "public"."exercise_log_sets"."id")) AS "mutation_result.r.sets.source" WHERE "parent_id" = "mutation_result"."id" AND "parent_kind" = "mutation_result"."kind") SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.sets.base"."parent_id" AS "parent_id", "mutation_result.r.sets.base"."parent_kind" AS "parent_kind", "mutation_result.r.sets.base"."reps" AS "reps") AS "_e")) AS "mutation_result.r.sets" FROM "mutation_result.r.sets.base") AS "mutation_result.r.sets") AS "mutation_result.r.sets" ON ('true') WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_sets) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
